For more than years has been executing objective manner the provision tourist services the different modalities tourism, especially the form adventure through walking and trekking trekking within the Cusco region and the Red Caminos Inka the Historic Sanctuary Machu Picchu from the year 2005 the present.
PERUVIAN SACRED ADVENTURE S.R.LTDA has the corresponding authorizations Law, compliance with Supreme Decree 004-2016-MINCETUR that regulates the provision the Travel agency service stated the Certificate 346-2017-GR-CUSCO DIRCETUR-DT issued the Department Foreign Trade and Tourism Cusco. Our travel agency and Tourism has extensive experience the conduct and operation activities the form adventure tourism the different tourist attractions our country being the most requested the Inka Trail Machupicchu its different routes well Salkantay, Lares Choquequirao, Huchuyqosqo, Wininkunka, Ausangate, Vilcabamba, Pumamarca, Ancascocha etc. among others and outside the Cusco region.

original text:
Sometimes you only have one friend. (Hey, it's better than not having any, right?) Regardless whether you are looking play game with your significant other, your best friend, some person that you just met, there time and place where you need good two-player game. So, here's list current favorites.
Not every game has deep and strategic order lot fun. And, Jab great little real-time game when you're looking for something quick but engaging. can bit problem when you and your opponent aren't evenly matched, might best pick one person that you play Jab with and reserve for them.
For some reason, abstract strategy games tend two-player. could have easily made list two-player games simply consisting them (but, you want that, you should really check out top ten abstract strategy games). Regardless, Arimaa great game it's own right, and would remiss not include it.
Well, the United States, currently have two-party political system. And, we've had since well before the 1960's. And so, it's only natural that there should games made about this very important aspect our country. Whether you find actual politics fascinating, are somewhat apathetic about them, you still might find 1960 fun game.
So, this point you may throwing flag and pointing out that Game Thrones: The (Living) Card Game states that 2-4 player. Yes, you would right, and this game technically breaks criteria. Yet, opinion this game was designed two player game with rules for additional players tacked later (like with Magic, Star Trek: CCG, and many others). Regardless that, Game Thrones fabulous game where you are constantly struggling back and forth with your opponent number different "challenges". Since first tried this game, became hooked and just wish that played more.
Returning the abstract strategy genre, Hive makes appearance the list. This could honestly considered low position for Hive, could easily have beaten out most the games above it, depending when put this list together. When think about two-player games, Hive one the first that comes mind, and one that enjoy sharing with others.
Jaipur can considered the "significant other specialty." (Yes, just made that term up.) all the games this list, think that this the best one for playing with "non-gamer" spouse. Sure, some you may married people that love play games just much you do. However, the more common scenario seems marriages which one person loves play games drastically more than the other. For these situations, think that Jaipur may ideal game play with your special someone.
The game abstract strategy list only manages make this one. This one was hard for rank, abstract games feel different than "traditional" strategy games. fact, when first thought about this list, completely neglected all abstract strategies then remembered them and had way too many games. So, happy medium, I've added the three you see with Dvonn being the top representative the genre once again.
One the best two player games come out the last few years Summoner Wars. Though don't play much I'd like (isn't that the story this entire list?), have continued buying every expansion they come out because know... some day.... will play more! And that point will have dozens factions that can use.
Really, did this surprise anybody? I'm guessing no. said review, Twilight Struggle enough fun tempt give this site that can dedicate more time playing instead learning new games. Though not flawless, immaculate tug war that epitomizes what two player game can be!
This top ten list really had lot titles that was sad whittle away. could have easily justified including Star Wars: The (Living) Card Game Android: Netrunner, but didn't want list too many Living/Customizable Card Games. was also shocked when didn't have enough room for Jambo. few others that just barely missed the cut were Dungeon Command, Mage Wars, and Lord the Rings: The Confrontation. Finally, Crokinole, which would have been lone dexterity entry, only missed the cut because the technicality that can played two four players.
think Axis and Allies Battle the Bulge great two player game. have had great deal fun with it.
Interesting. I've played some the other Axis and Allies offshoots, but not that one. Thanks for the tip!
You don't even list Lost Cities Balloon Cup? I'm not saying they are the best the world, though love them, and not saying Jab bad game. However. Both them are not even the Honorable Mention list.
Just kidding. need play more from your list. enjoy playing board games with wife and I'm always the hunt for new titles try.
So, didn't really care for Lost Cities all that much. It's not "bad", but wasn't for (or, more specifically, wife hated it).
haven't tried Balloon Cup, but hear good things about it, may need change that the near future.
Major agreement Jaipur and Summoner Wars.
recommendation for light 2-player pick-up-and-deliver game, wife and enjoy Perry Rhodan (even the movement rules were written someone with grasp orbital mechanics).
Interesting. saw Perry Rhodan sitting around FLGS Joplin for months, but the game never looked interesting enough try. Maybe missed the boat that one.
Out curiosity what didn't you like from Lost Cities.
Sure, the theme negligible, and very mathy, but LOVE messing with the draw options affect the speed the game.
wife didn't like the constant mathy-ness. Overall, just didn't engage much with the game. It's been couple years since I've played it, it's hard remember exactly what didn't click.
Great list Josh. Looks like need pick some more 2-player games. Balloon Cup currently out print, but believe that Rio Grande planning reprint with new title, Pinata, believe.

original text:
Born New Haven, Charles Goodyear attended school Naugatuck and, 1826, started the first retail domestic hardware store the with his father, inventor and businessman Amasa Goodyear, Philadelphia. Bankrupt four years later, Charles and his family endured poverty doggedly pursued new venture: the stabilization rubber for commercial use. 1844, after establishing the Naugatuck India-Rubber Company, Goodyear patented his vulcanization process discovery that has made possible range indispensible commercial products, from car tires sneaker treads. Despite this success, Goodyear battled patent infringements and debt until his death 1860. buried New Haven and was inducted into the National Inventors Hall Fame 1976.
Goodyear, Charles. Patent Model for the Manufacture Rubber Fabrics. 3,462. New York, NY, issued March 1844. Link.
Goodyear, Charles. Patent Number 3,462 Manufacture India Rubber Goods. US3462 New York, NY, issued March 1844. Link.
Goodyear, Charles. Patent Number 3,633 Improvement India-Rubber Fabrics. 3,633. New York, NY, issued June 15, 1844. Link.
Goodyear, Charles. Gum Elastic and Its Varieties: With Detailed Account Its Applications and Uses and the Discovery Vulcanization. Vol. New Haven: Charles Goodyear, 1853. Link.
Lamkin Foster, Boston, and Goodyear India Rubber Glove Company. Illustrated Catalogue the Goodyear India Rubber Glove Co.'s Boots and Shoes for the Season 1885-6. Boston, CT: The Firm, 1885. Link.
Wolf, Ralph India Rubber Man; the Story Charles Goodyear. Caldwell, ID: Caxton Printers, 1939.
Slack, Charles. Noble Obsession: Charles Goodyear, Thomas Hancock, and the Race Unlock the Greatest Industrial Secret the Nineteenth Century, 2002.
Geer, William Chauncey. The Reign Rubber. New York: The Century Company, 1922. Link.
Peirce, Bradford Trials Inventor: Life and Discoveries Charles Goodyear. New York: Carlton Porter, 1866. Link.

Expose Corrupt Courts: Federal Judge: "But you destroyed the faith the people their government."
Federal Judge Michael Mills: "But you destroyed the faith the people their government."
takes little longer for big city investigation come light than would smaller locale. But addition being patient, New Yorkers should encouraged the recent words Federal U.S. District Court Judge Michael Mills, notably this Super Bowl day from the town that brought New York Eli Manning- Oxford, Mississippi. There are many issues common little Oxford, Mississippi and big New York, New York: need for federal intervention over state corruption; conspiracy; public corruption; and the destruction the faith people have their government.
Despite numerous letters from prominent community members and glowing report cooperation from the U.S. Attorney's Office, insurance agent Ken Nowlin was sentenced Thursday spend months behind bars federal prison for conspiracy.
Nowlin was charged June with conspiracy for paying former Lafayette County Supervisor Gary Massey "commission" during Massey's term supervisor.
late July Nowlin pleaded guilty the charge and had been awaiting his sentencing hearing which was held Thursday afternoon the Federal Courthouse Oxford before U.S. District Judge Michael Mills. The Ecru insurance agent told Mills was sorry for his actions.
"Who mislead you?" Mills asked.
"An elected official, your honor," Nowlin replied.
U.S. Assistant Attorney Dave Sanders told Mills that Nowlin has fully cooperated with the investigation supplying documents and testifying before grand jury against Massey.
According the Federal Sentencing Guidelines, Nowlin faced months prison. The U.S. Attorney's Office filed motion for downward departure Nowlin's favor, asking the court consider sentence less than the guidelines stipulate since Nowlin was cooperative.
But despite the request and his cooperation, Mills sentenced Nowlin the maximum sentence months.
Nowlin was also sentenced pay $275,942 restitution back Lafayette County. Nowlin's attorney, Tony Farese, told Mills that Nowlin had already paid the full restitution Tuesday.
Mills allowed Nowlin remain out custody bail until March when will have report prison facility that will determined later date.
Massey and Nowlin were originally charged June for conspiracy, public corruption and money laundering 53-count indictment, which alleged Massey accepted payments excess $827,000 during his term supervisor from 1996 -2003, for the Lafayette County Employee Health Care Contract paid through Nowlin, the agent record the time.
Massey pleaded guilty September one count conspiracy and two counts public corruption. still awaiting sentencing date.
Sanders announced during Thursday's hearing that the remaining counts against Nowlin will dropped the U.S. Attorney's Office.
Before became supervisor 1995, Massey was the insurance agent record for Lafayette County. Federal prosecutors claim Massey used his influence get Nowlin the job insurance agent record exchange for the commission.

think Red Velvet Cake requirement for the holiday season. This Red Velvet Poke Cake definitely required for any holiday celebration this season! OMG! This cake out this world delicious!
Poke Cakes are one favorite desserts because can make them few days ahead time and they get better the longer they sit the fridge. Letting sit the fridge overnight gives the cake time soak all that yummy chocolate and sweetened condensed milk. hard wait overnight eat the cake, but really better you can muster the will power wait.
The star this recipe might the quick homemade Cream Cheese Frosting! OMG! really puts this poke cake over the top!! This Red Velvet Poke Cake going staple all our holiday parties. great for potlucks even homemade gift. Bake the cake foil pan and pop bow top.
While cake baking, mix milk and chocolate fudge topping until well blended. When the cake done and while it's still hot, poke holes with fork straw. Pour milk mixture over the cake. Allow cake cool completely.
Spread cream cheese frosting over the top. Chill.

original text:
organizations are becoming increasingly global, the need for efficient and effective project management tools necessary order accomplish business goals and process objectives. The increase demand for human resource requires "cross-functional, and often cross-cultural, geographically dispersed project teams" (Beise, 2004). Human resources are continually increasing skill, diversity and knowledge which can benefit cross cultural organizations. Organizations are always seeking competitive advantage with their competitors. result, project virtual teams are integrated business models potentially benefit business outcomes. The use electronic mechanisms, tools, and resources influences group processes and outcomes. Furthermore, the benefits limitations virtual teams can also evident project management implementation and outcomes.
Through this research will analyze and discuss how virtual teams face variety challenges; however the most critical challenge opinion that effective management and constructive leadership. Furthermore this paper will investigate virtual team there relational development dilemma which remains difficult aspect team success. The fact that virtual teams "are geographically and/or temporally dispersed and are brought together information and communication technologies" (Beise, Carte, Chidambaram, Vician, 2010) does not mean that the relational development the team cannot successful. will find through this research indeed virtual teams are more focused the actual task hand and less interested development relationships that are common with face face interactions. Essentially this social exchange within the context information systems suggests that "using face face meetings richer media the early stages virtual team development may foster closer interpersonal relationships" (Beise, Carte, Chidambaram, Vician, 2010). analyze the virtual teams and project management interaction styles come find that "interaction style has been shown have great effect conventional work teams' ability achieve solution quality and solution acceptance" (Balthazard, Potter, Warren, 2004).
Due advanced communication technologies, globalization and outsourcing most the project management teams are based groups individuals called virtual teams who work across time and space using communication technologies. Members virtual teams may employees same company from same country, they can contractors, suppliers and company employees around the globe.
Managing projects using virtual teams have some advantages and disadvantages. Also several studies have been done try determine the factors that are positively co-related the effectiveness virtual teams (Schwalbe, 2011). manage virtual teams successfully project management, the project manager must manage these factors successfully and also minimize the impact disadvantages.
This paper discusses the advantages and disadvantages the virtual teams project management and outlines the factors that are positively correlated the success projects based virtual teams. The paper also outlines some the recommendations successfully manage the virtual team information technology projects.
Globalization, outsourcing, virtual teams, video conferencing, telecommuting, Project Management, Trust and relationship, Advantages Virtual teams, Disadvantages virtual team.
Imagine that you are project manager multinational organization and managing project upgrade the server operating system and your team members are from different countries with different cultures and working different time zones. complete the project successfully that based virtual teams, project manager must understand the advantages and disadvantages managing virtual teams and factors that positively affect the team members. Today most the project management teams are based virtual teams whose members work across time and space using communication technologies and project managers cannot rely previous methods project team management where they were able build trust between team member social interaction, face-to-face meetings, and direct observations fellow team member commitment. (Kirkman, Rosen, Gibson, Tesluk, McPherson, 2002).
Virtual teams have some advantages and disadvantages. Some the advantages outlined Kathy Schwalbe are: 24/7 availability workers increasing competiveness and responsiveness, lowering the cost project many virtual team members not need office space and support, providing more flexibility and expertise project managers have access the talent around the globe and increasing the work/life balance for team members eliminating fixed office hours and the need travel work. (Schwalbe, 2011).
Radostina Purvanova reviewed experimental literature and emerging field research virtual teams. Author compared the "results from both type literature and found that experimental literature has largely reported negative results for virtual teams, whereas field investigations and case studies real virtual teams employed business organizations report positive outcomes for virtual teams." (Purvanova, Feb 2014) According the article although results reported experimental versus field studies are quite different, author concludes that both literatures have revealed negative attitudes toward virtual communication media.
The biggest advantage virtual team enjoyed organization the associated cost savings. The organization can save huge expenses real estate, office spaces, utility bills such gas, electricity, water etc. and executive's travel. Team members can work from anywhere and anytime the day. They can choose the place they work based the mood and the comfort. You can recruit people for their skills and suitability the job. The location does not matter. There time and money wasted for commuting and clothing. Physical handicaps are not issue.
Another advantage the labour laws, some organizations prefer have virtual teams because strict local labour laws. Since the members span the time zones, there could different team working the same project 24/7, when one member sleeps there will another one somewhere else who would start work where the former had left. This shortens the product development time well faster response time demands both global and local markets.
Since team members not frequently meet not meet all, the teamwork spirit may not present. Some people prefer physical office when working. These people will less productive virtual environments. work for virtual teams, individuals need have lot self-discipline. the individual not disciplined, she may less productive. The cultural difference between the members virtual teams gives rise number conflicts. For example, while employee from one part the world would write straightforward email describing bad situation; this would perceived impolite member the team from other part the world. This would lead conflicts, mistrust and difficulties fruitful collaboration which vital for the success virtual team functioning. These challenges are also precipitated the absence non-verbal cues intrinsic face-to-face interactions. Many members virtual teams are adversely affected the lack physical interactions. Most the communications virtual environment task-oriented. today's society where job important social force for most because many our workplace colleagues also constitute our close friends, this gives not-so-good feeling social isolation. This turn counter-effects productivity well leads stress. the virtual environment, better communicate, clarify, and confirm everything make sure that all members have the same understanding about the task hand. This produces ton paperwork and files that could quickly fill your archives.
Since team members are not communicating face face, constructive team and individual feedback early and often becomes more important and managed properly can avoid many problems before hand.
Trust between team members and project leader important factor that can affect the performance team members. One important way build trust between team members effective communication. The more they communicate with each other and with project more they build the trust.
Well defined and documented team process also important which saves lot time for especially new team members find answers their questions related policies and procedures.
Organizations such IBM, Microsoft, Whirlpool well SMEs are reaping the benefits virtual teams for some time now. has been well-recognized fact that virtual team not passing tide but here stay. Virtual teams are rising numbers nowadays and even small technology companies are now adapting virtual team practice for recruiting the best people from all over the globe and reduce the cost.
outlined previous sections, virtual teams have advantaged and some disadvantages well. benefit from advantages and minimize the impact disadvantages project manager can focus factors that positively affect the virtual team's performance. indicated previous researchers, increase trust, comfort level and communication effectiveness leads better project success.
All the above discussed disadvantages can overcome following different leadership approach, trainings, greater role clarity and effective communication strategies. Also earlier discussed factors that affect virtual teams, managed properly can result successful project. addition, the companies using virtual teams can minimize their operating costs and maximize the profit margins. Additionally, the employees working virtual teams are advantages when comes working their own home, own time, and reduction commuting costs. Therefore, organizations should look into setting virtual teams for different tasks whenever possible.
reap the benefits virtual teams projects and minimize the impact disadvantages virtual team managers should manage the outlined factors properly and should also follow best practices outlined next section.
When running virtual teams, some the best practices include: instant messaging program can used create sense presence amongst members the team. Chat good way have side conversations during meetings gain consensus, confirm understanding ask questions. Quick questions can asked through instant messenger substitute for popping into someone's cubicle. Services for syncing files, bug tracking, project management, source control, web conferencing, conference calls, screen recording, usability testing and on.

Virtual teams have some advantages and disadvantages. Some the advantages outlined Kathy Schwalbe are: 24/7 availability workers increasing competiveness and responsiveness, lowering the cost project many virtual team members not need office space and support, providing more flexibility and expertise project managers have access the talent around the globe and increasing the work/life balance for team members eliminating fixed office hours and the need travel work. (Schwalbe, 2011).
Radostina Purvanova reviewed experimental literature and emerging field research virtual teams. Author compared the "results from both type literature and found that experimental literature has largely reported negative results for virtual teams, whereas field investigations and case studies real virtual teams employed business organizations report positive outcomes for virtual teams." (Purvanova, Feb 2014) According the article although results reported experimental versus field studies are quite different, author concludes that both literatures have revealed negative attitudes toward virtual communication media.
The biggest advantage virtual team enjoyed organization the associated cost savings. The organization can save huge expenses real estate, office spaces, utility bills such gas, electricity, water etc. and executive's travel. Team members can work from anywhere and anytime the day. They can choose the place they work based the mood and the comfort. You can recruit people for their skills and suitability the job. The location does not matter. There time and money wasted for commuting and clothing. Physical handicaps are not issue.
Another advantage the labour laws, some organizations prefer have virtual teams because strict local labour laws. Since the members span the time zones, there could different team working the same project 24/7, when one member sleeps there will another one somewhere else who would start work where the former had left. This shortens the product development time well faster response time demands both global and local markets.
